$comment: Maps eventType -> list of platforms to fan out to. Per-tournament overrides live under `tournaments`. The policy router prefers a tournament-specific entry; falls back to `default`. See docs/27-social-distribution-strategy.md.

wc26.$comment: FIFA World Cup 2026 — fan-out everywhere on goals incl. reddit (r/soccer); brand cadence per docs/27.

fifa-wc-2022.$comment: Historic / demo content — restricted set, no reddit pushes.
